company.name: Hengshui Hongsheng Auto Parts Co., Ltd.

type.en: We are a professional manufacturer of automotive steering and suspension parts.
type.zh: 我们是一家专业生产汽车转向和悬挂系统零部件的工厂。

mainProducts.en: Our main products include steering arms, drag links, drive shafts, and related components.
mainProducts.zh: 我们的主要产品包括转向臂、直拉杆、传动轴等相关零部件。

support.en: OEM and custom manufacturing are available.
support.zh: 支持 OEM 和定制生产。

answer.en: Yes, we support OEM and custom manufacturing. Please send us your drawings, samples, or specific requirements, and we will evaluate and quote accordingly.
answer.zh: 是的，我们支持 OEM 和定制生产。请提供您的图纸、样品或具体需求，我们会根据要求评估并报价。

answer.en: MOQ depends on the specific product model. Please send us the part number or a photo, and we will confirm the details for you.
answer.zh: 最小起订量会根据具体产品型号而定。请发送产品型号或图片，我们会为您确认详细信息。

answer.en: The usual lead time is 15–30 days, depending on the product model, order quantity, and production schedule.
answer.zh: 通常交期为 15–30 天，具体取决于产品型号、订单数量和生产安排。

answer.en: Some regular models may be in stock. Please send us the model you need, and we will check availability for you.
answer.zh: 部分常规型号可能有库存。请发送您需要的型号，我们会尽快帮您确认。

answer.en: Yes, sample orders are available. Please send us the model number and quantity, and we will arrange it accordingly.
answer.zh: 可以，我们支持样品订单。请提供产品型号和数量，我们会根据情况安排。

answer.en: We usually use standard export packaging. Customized packaging is also available upon request.
answer.zh: 我们通常使用标准出口包装，也可以根据客户要求提供定制包装。

answer.en: We usually accept T/T payment. Other payment methods can also be discussed based on the order.
answer.zh: 我们通常接受 T/T 付款。其他付款方式也可以根据订单情况协商。

answer.en: We can arrange shipping by sea, air, or express according to your needs.
answer.zh: 我们可以根据您的需求安排海运、空运或快递发货。

answer.en: Our products have been exported to many countries and regions, and we can arrange according to customer requirements.
answer.zh: 我们产品已出口到多个国家和地区，具体可根据客户需求安排。

answer.en: If you find any quality issue after receiving the goods, please contact us with photos or videos. We will review the case and provide a solution as soon as possible.
answer.zh: 如果您收到货后发现质量问题，请及时提供照片或视频联系我们，我们会尽快核实并给出解决方案。

answer.en: Yes, please let us know which product category you are interested in, and we can send you the relevant catalog.
answer.zh: 可以，请告诉我们您感兴趣的产品类别，我们可以发送相关目录给您。

answer.en: We are a factory specializing in the production of automotive steering and suspension parts.
answer.zh: 我们是工厂，专注于汽车转向和悬挂系统零部件的生产。

answer.en: Yes, please send us the product model, quantity, and destination country/port, and we will quote you as soon as possible.
answer.zh: 可以，请发送产品型号、数量和收货国家/港口，我们会尽快给您报价。

answer.en: We can communicate in Chinese and English, and we can also assist with other languages if needed.
answer.zh: 我们可以用中文和英文沟通，也可以根据需要提供其他语言辅助回复。
